arts.ttl: Wolves Eye Bold Move for £200K-per-Week PSG Flop Wanted by Tottenham Hotspur
arts.sum: Milan Skriniar’s stint at Paris Saint-Germain appears to be nearing its end. The former Inter Milan center-back has joined Fenerbahçe on loan for the rest of the 2024-25 season. The 30-year-old signed with PSG as a free agent after leaving Inter and is under contract with the Ligue 1 side through 2028. arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers secured Matheus Cunha on a long-term deal during the winter transfer window, turning away interest from multiple clubs. But despite that, rumors about his future continue to swirl. Cunha has become a key player for Wolves, thriving in various attacking roles and making a consistent impact. arts.ttl: Liverpool Plot to Hijack €55M-Rated Man Utd Transfer Target With PSG Sell-on Clause
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain initially went with a short-term fix by sending Xavi Simons back to RB Leipzig on loan for another season. But his future seems more clear now—Leipzig have secured him on a permanent transfer. That said, PSG may have avoided a headache. arts.sum: Arsenal are headed to the UEFA Champions League semifinals after a 2-1 win over Real Madrid in the second leg of their quarterfinal, wrapping up a commanding 5-1 aggregate victory to book a date with Paris Saint-Germain. arts.ttl: Messi talks about his departure from PSG: "My intention was to return to Barcelona, but it was not possible"
arts.sum: At 37 years of age and the footballer with the most titles in the history of the game, Messi is well qualified to talk about a talent from La Masia, as he once was, who is now triumphing in the first team.
